//: Claude Desktop MCP config for Kninix Studio. Pick ONE server block below.
//desktop: DESKTOP: start the editor first (npm start); the sidecar attaches to the running app. Replace cwd with this project's absolute path.
//headless: HEADLESS/VPS (local): no GUI needed; the server runs its own engine. Replace cwd with this project's absolute path.
//remote: REMOTE VPS over HTTP: run `npm run mcp:http` on the VPS, tunnel with `ssh -L 3333:127.0.0.1:3333 user@vps`, then use the url block. See DEPLOY.md.
